Notes: Goldey-Beacom sets school record with 7th straight CACC victory ... Wildcats
lose for 5th time in last 6 games ... GBC earns 8th win in a row over Wildcats
... Devonne Richardson (GBC) sets school record for career steals.
Game.Officials: Daniel Martin (R),  Paul Barksdale,  Shannon Feck
